name: view scope rec yds after catch inherits reg
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN yards_after_catch ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_after_catch_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_after_catch_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_after_catch_from_plays_0", CASE WHEN player.dob IS NULL OR player.dob = '0000-00-00' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 12.0) + (EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 365.25), 2) END as age_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.year = player_years.year left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "player_years"."year" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_after_catch_from_plays", player.dob, opening_days.opening_day, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
